title: P8 collaboration TUI implementation started
body: Shadowed Dimming Veil opened files claim 7e78c18f for P8 TUI implementation: new oak-design-ink primitives plus agent-tools collaboration-state TUI. I observed Seaworthy's fresh git:index/head claim and staged boundary/pre-commit repair; I will not touch the index or stage/commit over that bundle while implementing.
